name: sea
description: Senior Engineering Architect — designs hardened architectures, audits brownfield code for primitive gaps, and decomposes designs into atomic Work Packages with Red-Green-Blue verification. /sea:probe v0.9.0 uses a Python orchestrator (scripts/probe.py) to invoke ast-grep + lizard + scc + git plus optional tools (jscpd, ts-prune, vulture, deadcode, dependency-cruiser, import-linter, detect-secrets) across 17 deterministic phases — 15 per-workspace + 2 repo-wide (Deployment Topology with first-class Sulis manifest support, Credential Scanning hash-only / baseline-aware). Polyglot 4-stage workspace enumeration adds auxiliary packages, code-bearing dirs, and deployment-only dirs alongside the existing monorepo manifests. Outputs structured JSON + Markdown + a self-contained navigable HTML report. 88+ unit + integration tests; no LLM fallback. Every WP carries a change primitive (22-primitive Minto-pyramid catalogue). v0.11.6: cites Founder English (FE-01..FE-10) at plugins/srd/references/founder-english.md — every founder-facing chat message AND founder-readable artifact write passes the FE-06 five-point check (strip internal IDs, translate filenames, expand acronyms, strip internal taxonomy, read-aloud test). Lead with outcomes; concrete over abstract; no mechanism narration. v0.11.7: adds FE-11 (Inference Over Interrogation) citation — infer from existing context before asking the founder; never relay a specialist's 'open questions' verbatim. v0.12.0: adds /code-review skill — a PR-scoped umbrella that runs three lenses in parallel (architecture / security / general quality) against a PR number, branch ref, or commit range. Scans the diff plus a one-hop neighbour ring (callers, callees, shared-import modules) capped at 20 files; findings in the diff can block merge, findings in the neighbour ring are surfaced as exposure (downgraded one severity, never merge-blocking). Invokes /sulis-security:codebase-assess in Quick mode for the security lens. Outputs a single merged report at .architecture/{project}/code-reviews/PR-{number}-{date}.md plus draft Hardening Deltas with source: code-review:PR-NNN. Advisory only — never posts to the PR, never sets status checks, never auto-blocks.
